mapper.insert: insert into kh_disease_drug (disease_id, drug_id, treate_desc, create_time, update_time) values (#{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{treateDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: select disease_id, drug_id, treate_desc, create_time, update_time from kh_disease_drug
